hypothesis: If one-shot prompting with a complex in-context example is used, then the efficient LLM o4-mini will achieve a higher collection rate and higher structural and parametric precision, recall, and F1 in extracting PROV-DM-compliant synthesis graphs from materials science papers than zero-shot prompting and than larger models (GPT-4.1, GPT-4.1 mini), because the complex example better guides the model to identify procedures, nodes, edges, and attributes.
